column1: # Undo (Alt-F4) — reverts the previous mutating command.
#   - /Worksheet Delete Row: Alt-F4 restores the removed row's cells.
#   - Cell edit overwrite: Alt-F4 restores the prior contents.
# /WDR — delete the pointer's row (row 1, value 42). Row 2 shifts up.
# Alt-F4 reverts the cell back to 42.
# Extra Alt-F4 with an empty journal is a no-op.
